synthesis.gel_composition: 1.0 eq. HBFP (para-F) : 1.5 eq. K2CO3 : 1.40 eq. 18-crown-6 : 1.10 eq. potassium 4-hydroxyphenyl sulfonate

parse.why: Synthesis of FPSA100 (100% sulfonated HBFP) described in 'Synthesis of 4-Hydroxyphenyl Sulfonated Substituted HBFP' procedure: HBFP (0.50g, 1.04mmol para-F, 1.0 eq.), K2CO3 (0.216g, 1.56mmol, 1.5 eq.), 18-crown-6 (0.385g, 1.46mmol, 1.40 eq.), potassium 4-hydroxyphenyl sulfonate (0.243g, 1.15mmol, 1.10 eq.) in DMAc (5.21mL, 0.2M) stirred 3 days at room temperature. Post-treatment: precipitated into 1M HCl, filtered, dried, then washed with hot 1M KCl to remove 18-crown-6. No zeolite/framework code; 18-crown-6 is catalyst not template; no silica/alumina sources; no crystallization step.
